summary: Set 084 Session 3 (final): instruction surfaces, the incident-3 reproduction UAT, and release preparation for the two publishes. STEP 1 -- instruction surfaces: propagated the already-shipped F1/F2/F3 + close-backstop machinery to every operative doc and template (stale-echo sweep, L-065-1). start-here.md.template (Copilot --model requirement at start_session; Step 5 verification_unavailable/--manual-verify; Step 6 the close backstop + stamped-row corroboration -- verify_session_cli OR close_session_backstop source); engine-file.agents-tail.md (Copilot seat --model requirement; Mode-B provider-label check reframed so a Copilot seat's identity is the MODEL, not the label, and a false label is gaming not satisfying); getting-started.md.template (per-session --model note); docs/ai-led-session-workflow.md (Step 6 identity/exclusion/stamp/backstop subsection, Step 8 backstop pointer, rules-list #2, maxout); ai_router/docs/close-out.md (the --manual-verify attestation contents required to resolve verification_unavailable); docs/concepts/tier-model.md (Copilot seat-profile F1 block); docs/quick-start.md and docs/repository-reference.md sec3 (route()->verify_session, dynamic exclusion, stamp, backstop); docs/session-state-schema.md (identityProvenance mirrored in the worked example, L-066-1 parity); two lower-priority static-pin echoes (a case study + the surface-strategy doc). Cold-start golden fixtures and the extension dist template bundle regenerated (coldStartSnapshot + test_cold_start_acceptance green). close-out.md contract drift FIXED (path-aware-critique finding A, L-064-8 stale-claim / L-069-1 fix-every-sibling): the removed --timeout / verification_timeout / message_ids / wait_outcome wait-loop interface was still documented in Section 2 (which --help echoes) and in a close_session.py docstring; both cleaned to the live contract (exit-4 = aborted_at_soft_gate; verification block emits method only). STEP 2 -- per-set UAT checklist authored to the 078-083 bar (2 walks, 7 real items) reproducing incident 3 against the new machinery: a Walk-0 version gate (pip uninstall + install -e <this-checkout>, confirm >= 0.29.0 -- L-075-1, the exact skew that invalidated both prior walks, reproduced live during authoring as stale editable dist-info); Walk 1 a REAL cold-start Full Build from an empty folder (L-079-3) asserting the shipped start-here teaches the backstop + --model + no-skip/no-automatic; Walk 2 the Copilot-seat incident-3 reproduction -- start_session --engine github-copilot WITHOUT --model refuses (literal string dogfooded, exit 2), WITH --model claude-sonnet-4.6 records identityProvenance: asserted, verify_session --dry-run shows 'excluded providers: anthropic', a REAL verify_session refuses under a single-provider-family catalog (VERIFICATION UNAVAILABLE, dogfooded), and an unverified close_session runs the backstop live and its verdict governs. Literal strings captured by running the real commands in C:/temp/uat-084-scratch. RELEASE PREP: dabbler-ai-router bumped to 0.29.0 (pyproject) with the combined Sets 083+084 CHANGELOG and an L-078-1 Rollback naming the registry-live 0.28.0 fallback; extension bumped to 0.39.0 (package.json) + combined CHANGELOG. Actual PyPI/Marketplace PUBLISH and the repository-reference Published-status update remain operator-authorized (tag-driven CI: v0.29.0 -> release.yml, vsix-v0.39.0 -> publish-vscode.yml). REQUIRED PATH-AWARE CRITIQUE (openai + google, ok=True): finding A (close-out.md contract drift) accepted and FIXED; finding B (--force skips the backstop) adjudicated FALSE POSITIVE -- the backstop guard in close_session.py is 'if not args.manual_verify and not no_router:' with NO args.force term, the comment reads 'every Full-tier close INCLUDING --force (I-084-S2-1)', and test_force_path_also_gets_the_backstop / test_force_close_with_blocking_backstop_verdict_is_refused prove --force runs the backstop; the critic hallucinated a 'not args.force' guard. Artifact kept pre-fix as evidence (L-070-1); adjudication here. STEP 6 verification VERIFIED (round 6, gemini-pro, anthropic excluded by F2 resolution on this session's own orchestrator). Journey: rounds 1-3 were a hall-of-mirrors -- the session's own verification-round / path-aware-critique PROCESS-RECORDS were in the evidence diff and the snippet-fed push verifier (no repo access) trusted their stale/false claims (re-raising the finding-B --force hallucination and a message_ids-not-removed claim that grep disproves), amplified by a 'this is a HALLUCINATION' conventions note that made the verifier distrust the orchestrator over the artifact. Root cause fixed by EXCLUDING those recursive records from the diff (--exclude) and dropping the defensive framing; the corrected verification (rounds 4-6, clean input) found 4 GENUINE improvements, all fixed: UAT dry-run strengthened to exercise the real verification_unavailable refusal; UAT hardcoded checkout path -> <this-checkout> placeholder; agents-tail Mode-B label framing reworked; activity-log release-prep re-logged under the spec's s3.release progress key. openai gpt-5-4 was persistently 429 rate-limited, so Step 6 ran on the remaining cross-provider verifier gemini-pro via an out-of-tree AI_ROUTER_CONFIG (tracked config keeps its gpt-5-4 preference, so no config change appears in the verified diff). POST-VERIFICATION UAT FIX (Set 084 S3, found by the operator's out-of-band Copilot Hello-World run): a real github-copilot orchestrator on the copilot-cli seat exposed a Windows drive-letter case-sensitivity bug class -- it passed --session-set-dir with a lowercase drive (c:\...) while git reports uppercase (C:\...), and two-source path comparisons that did not os.path.normcase both sides spuriously rejected the legitimate verify_session stamp (verification_stamp.validate_stamped_row 'does not sit at the session-set root') and mis-scoped the working-tree gate, forcing the backstop to re-run redundant rounds. Fixed the whole class (L-069-1) after a sibling sweep: the stamp artifact-dir check, the working-tree in-scope match (gate_checks), the cost_report metrics-row match, and the metrics-row slug reducers (gate_checks + verify_session) all now case-fold both sides with normcase (no-op on POSIX). Regression tests in test_windows_path_case.py (Windows-gated drive-letter repro + portable case-fold). The core Set 084 machinery itself was confirmed working end-to-end by that same Copilot run (identity --model required, cross-provider gpt-5-4 verify excluding anthropic, backstop engaged, close succeeded); the version trap (the scaffold's 0.28.0 PyPI install lacking verify_session/backstop) was the operator's separate observation that motivates publishing 0.29.0. CLOSE-OUT NOTE: the authoritative Step 6 verdict is round 7 VERIFIED (gemini-pro, anthropic excluded, process-records --excluded). At close, the session own verification/critique process-records (s3-issues*, s3-verification*, path-aware-critique.json) are now COMMITTED, so the close backstop diffs them against the pre-session base and re-reads their pre-fix/false-positive findings (the finding-B --force hallucination proven false by test_force_path_also_gets_the_backstop; the operator-gated UAT), plus bookkeeping churn from repeated re-verify attempts -- the L-070-1 hall-of-mirrors at the close boundary. The backstop cannot --exclude the session own committed artifacts (candidate framework follow-up: close_backstop should exclude sN-verification*/sN-issues*/path-aware-critique.json from its evidence diff the way verify_session does). Resolution per operator authorization.
residuals: OPERATOR-GATED (pending, not defects): the requiresUAT operator walk (checklist authored + deterministic parts dogfooded; the human incident-3 walk + attestation is an operator process gate, never a close_session gate) and the actual PyPI/Marketplace publish + the repository-reference.md Published-status update (version bumps + changelogs + rollback prepared; the tag-driven CI publish is operator-authorized -- v0.29.0 -> release.yml, vsix-v0.39.0 -> publish-vscode.yml). repository-reference still names the registry-live 0.28.0/0.38.0 by design (L-078-1) until publish.

Lightweight Mode-B cross-provider check still keys on the free-text --provider LABEL (Set 077 machinery, unchanged by Set 084 per non-goal). A false label could slip a same-provider pair past the Lightweight check; documented in agents-tail.md as gaming-not-satisfying, and F1 now forces a --model whose registry-provider mismatch prints a warning. Full-tier (the incident-3 surface) is model-based; extending model-based identity to the Lightweight guardrail is a future set.

VERIFICATION-METHODOLOGY (candidate lesson): a session's own verification-round artifacts (sN-verification*.md, sN-issues*.json) and path-aware-critique.json MUST be excluded from the Step-6 self-verification diff (--exclude), or the snippet-fed push verifier trusts their pre-fix/false-positive claims as ground truth and manufactures cascade false positives (rounds 2-3 here). Corollary: do not hand a snippet-fed verifier a 'that finding is a hallucination' note while ALSO leaving the contradicting artifact in the diff -- it distrusts the orchestrator over the artifact. Remove the artifact from the diff instead.

ROUTER ROBUSTNESS (candidate follow-up): the two-attempt verifier fallback did not auto-switch providers when gpt-5-4 returned repeated 429s (it retried openai 3x and failed rather than re-picking gemini); Step 6 needed a manual out-of-tree AI_ROUTER_CONFIG preference override to reach a cross-provider verifier. Also observed: AI_ROUTER_CONFIG is honored for config LOAD but a constrained-verifier config placed via env var did not change verifier SELECTION in one scratch test -- worth a targeted look at env-config vs selection precedence.

WINDOWS PATH CASE (fixed this session): the drive-letter case class is closed in the close/verify path; the write site (verification_stamp.repo_relative_posix) was already drive-case-neutral via os.path.relpath and left unchanged. A general 'compare filesystem paths only via normcase' convention is a promotion candidate.
